questions.question: Explain the main difference between a cyclic code and a non-cyclic code.
questions.hint: Cyclic codes and non-cyclic codes are two types of block codes used for error detection and correction in data transmission.

questions.question: State the procedure for adding redundancy to a data message to produce an encoded message using cyclic coding.
questions.hint: Cyclic coding involves adding redundancy to a data message by repeating each bit in the data message, with the addition of a parity bit.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a generator polynomial in cyclic coding?
questions.hint: The generator polynomial is used to determine the parity bits to be added to the data message in cyclic coding.
